author: Russ
description: Make slide decks as single-file HTML presentations: PPTX-like editing with drag-to-reorder, inline text with a format toolbar, image paste/drag/resize, and a built-in player with fullscreen and PDF export. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Russ
manifest.description: Make slide decks as single-file HTML presentations: PPTX-like editing with drag-to-reorder, inline text with a format toolbar, image paste/drag/resize, and a built-in player with fullscreen and PDF export.
manifest.name: SlideDope

name: SlideDope
